# Generated by Build Orchestrator

# CRITICAL OPTIMIZATION:
# Instead of listing 1000+ individual snapshot files (causing token bloat),
# this file points to an AGGREGATED SUMMARY that consolidates patterns.

# USAGE FOR CLAUDE:
# 1. Read the aggregated summary file below FIRST
# 2. If the summary mentions comprehensive_leak_report.txt, analyze that
# 3. DO NOT try to read individual snapshot files - they've been pruned
